page.title: Collections
page.desc: Save your currently enabled mods and variants as a named collection. Apply collections atomically to instantly switch your entire game loadout.

no_active_game.title: No Active Game
no_active_game.desc: Select a game first, then open Collections.

list.empty_desc: Create your first {{mode}} collection by clicking "Save Current State" at the top right.

preview.title: Collection Preview
preview.no_selection: Select a collection to see its contents.

apply.title: Apply Collection: {{name}}
apply.desc: You are about to switch your active loadout. Review the target state before proceeding.

missing.title: Missing Mods Detected
missing.desc: The following mods are referenced by this collection but cannot be found on disk. They may have been deleted or moved.
missing.anyway_q: Do you want to apply the collection anyway?

save.title: Save as New Collection
save.desc: Creates a new collection from your current mod loadout.
save.label: Collection Name

error.empty: Please enter a name for the collection.

recovery.title: Interrupted Task Detected
recovery.desc: EMMM detected that a previous critical operation (like applying a collection or switching Safe Mode) was interrupted before finishing.
recovery.warning: Clearing these tasks will allow you to access the app again. You should manually retry the collection apply or mode switch that was interrupted to ensure your game files are in the correct state.

toast.cleared: Interrupted tasks have been cleared. You may retry your last action.
toast.resumed: Interrupted operation successfully resumed and completed.

randomizer.title: Smart Randomizer
randomizer.desc: Recommends 1 random disabled mod for every active Character. Review and apply.
randomizer.no_eligible: No eligible character mods found (check filters or ensure you have disabled mods).
